releases.headline: HA core: leader election and fencing tokens

items.title: Leader election and fencing-token primitive
items.body: Adds the high-availability core: an operator-facing leader-election primitive with monotonic fencing tokens so followers can detect and refuse stale-leader writes against shared resources.

releases.headline: Strip internal-process narrative from framework comments

items.title: Source comments rewritten to operator-facing voice
items.body: Rewrites in-source comments across `lib/` to describe what each primitive does and why operators care, removing internal-process vocabulary that meant nothing outside the maintainer workflow.

releases.headline: Internal adoption pass and functional scale helpers

items.title: Internal adoption of framework primitives across `lib/`
items.body: Refactors framework-internal call sites to compose the public primitives they previously open-coded, and adds the functional scale helpers used by hot-path observability sinks.

releases.headline: Atomic file I/O and safe XML and CSV parsers

items.title: Atomic file I/O and safe XML and CSV parsers
items.body: Adds the atomic file-write primitive that survives mid-write crashes plus hardened XML and CSV parsers with depth, byte, and field-count caps to refuse pathological inputs.

releases.headline: HTTP middleware: request lifecycle hardening begins

items.title: HTTP middleware request-lifecycle hardening
items.body: Starts the HTTP middleware family with the request-lifecycle hardening primitives that wire security defaults into every request entering the framework.

releases.headline: External database support, app-data-only shape with bring-your-own client

items.title: External database support in app-data-only shape
items.body: Adds the external-database integration in its app-data-only configuration: operators bring their own database client and the framework uses it exclusively for application data, keeping audit and key material on the sealed local store.

releases.headline: Log streaming, redaction, and bidirectional command channel

items.title: Log streaming with redaction and bidirectional command channel
items.body: Introduces the log-stream primitive with built-in field redaction plus a bidirectional command channel so operators can stream logs out and push runtime commands in over the same transport.

releases.headline: Queue dispatcher with local SQLite-backed protocol

items.title: Queue dispatcher and SQLite-backed local protocol
items.body: Adds the work-queue dispatcher primitive together with a local SQLite-backed protocol adapter so operators can run durable background work without standing up an external broker.

releases.headline: GCS and Azure Blob protocol adapters complete the object-store surface

items.title: Google Cloud Storage and Azure Blob adapters
items.body: Adds the GCS and Azure Blob protocol adapters alongside the existing SigV4 adapter, giving the object-store primitive coverage of every major cloud provider out of the box.

releases.headline: SigV4 protocol adapter for S3-compatible object stores

items.title: SigV4 protocol adapter
items.body: Adds the AWS SigV4 signing adapter so the object-store primitive can talk to S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, MinIO, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces, and any other SigV4-speaking endpoint with a single configuration shape.

releases.headline: Generic remote data layer with classification-routed bifurcation

items.title: Generic remote data layer with classification-routed bifurcation
items.body: Adds a generic remote data-access layer that routes reads and writes to distinct backends based on the data's classification label, so sensitive records can be steered to a hardened store while bulk data uses a cheaper path.

releases.headline: Full tamper-proof bar with signed checkpoints and rollback detection

items.title: Signed audit checkpoints and rollback detection
items.body: Completes the tamper-evident bar for the audit chain by adding cryptographically signed checkpoints and a verifier that detects rollback or truncation of the persisted log.

releases.headline: Traceability hardening and dynamic PK/FK schema declarations

items.title: Traceability hardening and dynamic primary-key/foreign-key schema declarations
items.body: Strengthens the audit trail's correlation identifiers across request boundaries and extends the database schema layer to declare primary and foreign keys dynamically from the migration definitions.

releases.headline: Security-focused JSON parsing and schema validation

items.title: Hardened JSON parser and schema validator
items.body: Adds a depth-and-byte-capped JSON parser plus a companion schema validator that operators compose at request boundaries to refuse oversized or pathological payloads before they touch handlers.

items.title: Session primitive and local storage backend
items.body: Introduces the encrypted session primitive and the on-disk local storage backend that hosts session state when no external store is wired.

releases.headline: Audit chain, consent log, and subject rights

items.title: Tamper-evident audit chain, consent log, and subject-rights primitives
items.body: Adds the append-only audit chain, the consent log used for lawful-basis tracking, and the data-subject-rights workflow primitives covering access, rectification, and erasure requests.

releases.headline: Database, query builder, field-crypto, and migrations

items.title: Database stack with query builder, field-level crypto, and migrations
items.body: Adds the in-tree database layer including a parameterised query builder, per-field encryption hooks, and a migration runner that operators invoke at boot.

items.title: Vault and key-management primitives
items.body: Introduces the framework's sealed key store and the primitives that wrap key derivation, storage, and rotation for downstream crypto consumers.

items.title: Initial framework foundation
items.body: First published version establishing the framework's core layout, module conventions, and zero-runtime-dependency posture.
